nodes.norm_label: convert unitypy objects into json-serializable plain containers.

nodes.label: Subagent Policy
nodes.rationale: Use subagents when parallel investigation, smaller context windows, or clear task ownership materially improve the work; keep the main agent on orchestration, synthesis, and high-risk judgment.

nodes.label: Generated And Derived Artifacts
nodes.rationale: Generated outputs are build artifacts, not source of truth, so they should not be reviewed or edited directly during ordinary work.

nodes.label: Preferred Source Paths
nodes.rationale: Implementation and review should focus on source directories and documentation paths that are treated as authoritative inputs.

nodes.label: Browser App Module Boundaries
nodes.rationale: The browser app uses explicit ES-module boundaries for state, data, and rendering, with render modules receiving state-derived values instead of importing app state directly.

nodes.label: Change Rules
nodes.rationale: Behavior should be fixed by changing source or generators and rebuilding, with verification required after source, generator, or data changes.
